content.observe: Four things hold this world together: a CPU that executes, memory that stores, I/O that connects outward, and a bus that ties them into one loop.
content.fault: You reached for an instruction and nothing answered. The loop is broken somewhere between fetch and execute — trace it.

hotspots.label: CPU
hotspots.detail: Fetches, decodes, and executes one instruction at a time.

hotspots.label: Main Memory
hotspots.detail: Holds the instructions and data the CPU is currently working with.

hotspots.label: I/O Controller
hotspots.detail: Bridges the system to keyboards, disks, and everything outside it.

hotspots.label: System Bus
hotspots.detail: The shared pathway every component uses to talk to every other one.
